values.name: query
values.value: SELECT p.*, u.first_name as agent_first_name, u.last_name as agent_last_name FROM properties p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.agent_id = u.id WHERE p.updated_at > $1 ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC LIMIT 50

values.name: query
values.value: INSERT INTO property_notifications (property_id, customer_id, notification_type, sent_at, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, NOW(), 'pending')
